name: Chocolate Decadence Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, melt broken chocolate with butter, stirring constantly until smooth. Alternatively, microwave on medium for 2½ to 3 minutes, stirring until smooth.
2. Beat the egg yolks a few minutes with 2 tbsp of sugar and vanilla.
3. Remove the melted chocolate from heat and, using a wire whisk, quickly stir in the beaten egg yolks.
4. Beat the egg whites with salt, gradually adding the remaining sugar, beating until soft peaks form.
5. Pour the chocolate mixture into a large bowl and gently fold in the beaten egg whites on top using the wire whisk. Do not overmix.
6. Cut parchment paper to fit the bottom of a 9-inch spring form pan.
7. Butter the bottom of the pan and the top of the parchment paper.
8. Spread the batter evenly into the prepared pan.
9. Bake in the lower third of the oven at 350°F for 30-35 minutes, or until cracked on top and a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Cool on a wire rack. The cake will shrink slightly as it cools.
11. Remove the pan and loosen the cake from the paper.
12. Serve with either Dark Chocolate Glaze or Whipped Cream Frosting with Raspberry Sauce. For chocolate-glazed cake, turn the cake upside down onto a flat cake plate. For Whipped Cream Frosting, place the cake top side up.
Separate recipes
